channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Aggies avenge loss to UNLV, 76-71
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Five Aggies scored in double figures, as Utah State avenged its only Mountain West Conference loss of the season against UNLV Wednesday night, 76-71.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Royals agree with RHP Carlos Estévez on 2-year, $22M deal, person familiar with deal tells AP
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — The Royals and reliever Carlos Estévez have agreed to a two-year, $22 million contract, giving Kansas City another potential closer alongside Lucas Erceg, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man City rallies to beat Club Brugge and advance in Champions League. PSG also wins and stays in
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — Manchester City stayed in the Champions League, barely. Paris Saint-Germain saved its elite status in style. Both had risked embarrassing exits before winning on Wednesday, grateful to be among the 24 teams in the knockout stage.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bill Belichick jokes Lombardi Trophy should be renamed after Tom Brady
item.description: Legendary NFL head coach Bill Belichick joked on the latest episode of the "Let's Go!" podcast that the Vince Lombardi Trophy should be renamed after Tom Brady.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fire breaks out at kiosk outside Man City's stadium before Champions League game
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — A fire broke out at a merchandise stand outside Manchester City’s stadium shortly before players were due to arrive for the Champions League match against Brugge on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles' run to the Super Bowl vs. the Chiefs is fueled by changes after epic collapse last season
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — The Eagles were indeed flying high as the best in the NFL, boasting a 10-1 record with a No. 1 seed, home-field advantage in the playoffs, and yes, a Super Bowl ring all ahead as credible goals. This season? On the way to the Super Bowl on Feb.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mikaela Shiffrin prioritizes recovery over chasing World Cup win No. 100 in return from ski crash
item.description: Mikaela Shiffrin's pursuit of World Cup win No. 100 isn't at the top of her priority list on the eve of her return to ski racing two months after a serious crash. For her, the slalom competition Thursday in Courchevel, France, is simply the next step in getting her health back to 100%.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Where could the NFL hold an international Super Bowl? The pros and cons of potential hosts
item.description: LONDON (AP) — It’s a question Roger Goodell gets when he’s in London: Would the NFL stage a Super Bowl internationally? The usual answer is that America’s biggest sporting event is reserved for cities that have NFL franchises. But as the commissioner noted in October, “ things change.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bulls bench big in 129-121 win over Nuggets
item.description: Nikola Vucevic had 20 points, 10 rebounds and six assists, and the Chicago Bulls handed the Denver Nuggets their second straight loss with a 129-121 victory on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Super Bowl LIX matchup set
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The stage is set for Super Bowl 59, with two heavyweights ready to clash: the Kansas City Chiefs and the Philadelphia Eagles. The game will feature marquee stars Patrick Mahomes, Jalen Hurts, Travis Kelce, and Saquon Barkley.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Taylor Swift watches boyfriend Travis Kelce and the Chiefs beat the Bills and get back to Super Bowl
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — You could say that Taylor Swift's championship era has reached its second consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bills cornerback Christian Benford ruled out of AFC title game vs. Chiefs with a concussion
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Buffalo Bills cornerback Christian Benford was ruled out of the AFC title game against the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday night with a concussion.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ryan Pressly waives no-trade clause to join the Chicago Cubs, AP source says
item.description: The Chicago Cubs are finalizing a trade for Ryan Pressly, adding the right-hander to the back end of their bullpen in their second major offseason deal with the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Harris English holds off Sam Stevens by a shot in the Farmers Insurance Open at Torrey Pines
item.description: Harris English held off hard-charging Sam Stevens to win the Farmers Insurance Open by one shot, securing his fifth career PGA Tour victory with a 1-over 73 in challenging weather.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: USU improves to 18-2 after blowout win at Air Force
item.description: COLORADO SPRINGS, Colo. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State basketball team continues to roll through the Mountain West Conference. The Aggies improved to 8-1 in league play, 18-2 overall, picking up an 87-58 road win over Air Force at Clune Arena.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago faces Philadelphia on 4-game home slide
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (16-27, 11th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (19-26, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Bulls -3.5; over/under is 230.5 BOTTOM LINE: Chicago hosts Philadelphia looking to stop its four-game home slide.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Winnipeg hat trick sinks Utah HC, 5-2
item.description: WINNIPEG (AP) - Three goals ended Utah's three-game winning streak. Cole Perfetti scored his first NHL hat trick, including the go-ahead goal, for the Winnipeg Jets in a 5-2 win against the Utah Hockey Club at Canada Life Centre on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kucherov scores in OT to give Lightning 4-3 win over Blackhawks
item.description: Nikita Kucherov scored 58 seconds into overtime and had two assists as the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the Chicago Blackhawks 4-3 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jaguars hire Bucs OC Liam Coen as head coach after making necessary moves
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The Jacksonville Jaguars hired Tampa Bay offensive coordinator Liam Coen as the eighth head coach in franchise history Friday, capping a covert operation that included owner Shad Khan moving on from general manager Trent Baalke and Coen reversing course with the Buccaneers.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: L.A.'s Genesis Invitational will be held at Torrey Pines due to fires
item.description: After several major fires erupted in Los Angeles earlier this month, the 2025 Genesis Invitational scheduled for next month has been moved to Torrey Pines Golf Course, the PGA Tour confirmed in a social media post Friday morning.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC shuts out Minnesota for third straight victory
item.description: ST. PAUL (AP) - Karel Vejmelka made 26 saves for his first shutout of the season, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Minnesota Wild 4-0 at Xcel Energy Center on Thursday. “We did a great job,” Vejmelka said. “Boys played real well in front of me and they helped me a lot.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
